name: Strawberry Nut Dessert Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Gold Medal all purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a medium bowl, mix flour and powdered sugar.
3. Stir in enough melted butter or margarine with a fork until the dough is moistened and smooth.
4. Transfer the dough to an ungreased 12-inch pizza pan and press it evenly.
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown; cool on a wire rack.
6. In a small bowl, beat granulated sugar, lemon juice, and softened cream cheese with an electric mixer on high speed until smooth and fluffy.
7. Spread the mixture over the cooled crust and refrigerate for about 30 minutes or until chilled.
8. In a saucepan, mix granulated sugar and cornstarch, then add water. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
9. Boil and stir for 1 minute after the mixture begins to boil; cool for 10 minutes.
10. Stir in strawberries and pecans into the cooled mixture.
11. Spoon the fruit mixture over the cream cheese layer and refrigerate for about an hour or until chilled.
12. Cut into wedges. Store any remaining pizza slices covered in the refrigerator.
8 to 10 servings
